area: Task lock cleanup / canonical direction lock
finding: `tasks lock cleanup --all-stale` reported 151 stale locks cleaned and released the runtime lock's embedded direction lock, but left the terminal task ledger's canonical `taskDirectionLock.status` active. `tasks repair-claim` simultaneously reported no repairable drift, so `taskflow close` remained blocked with `ATM_TASKFLOW_CLOSE_BROKER_TAKEOVER_REQUIRED`.
expectedBehavior: Cleanup must synchronize terminal stale-lock release across the runtime lock, task ledger direction lock, and sidecar, and report each mutation accurately.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed 2026-07-14: `releaseLock()` now syncs embedded + canonical direction locks and sidecar. Regression: `packages/cli/src/commands/tasks/__tests__/lock-cleanup.spec.ts`.
followUp: Governed commit/close still pending after foreign runner-sync wipe recovery.
